_meta.description: Deterministic workflow templates per destination country. Each step has a key, title, description, and dependencies. Statuses are assigned at runtime based on profile + eligibility.

steps.title: Confirm passport validity
steps.description: Ensure your passport is valid for the duration of your intended studies.

steps.title: Secure CAS / unconditional offer
steps.description: Obtain a Confirmation of Acceptance for Studies (CAS) from a licensed UK sponsor.

steps.title: Complete English language test (SELT)
steps.description: Take an approved Secure English Language Test such as IELTS UKVI.

steps.title: Prepare proof of funds
steps.description: Assemble bank statements or sponsorship evidence meeting UKVI maintenance thresholds.

steps.title: TB test (if required for your nationality)
steps.description: Some nationalities require a tuberculosis test from an approved clinic.

steps.title: Complete document checklist
steps.description: Gather all documents required for the Student Route application.

steps.title: Fill visa application & pay IHS/fees
steps.description: Complete the online application, pay the visa fee and the Immigration Health Surcharge.

steps.title: Book biometrics appointment
steps.description: Attend a VFS/visa application centre appointment for biometrics.

steps.title: Submit application
steps.description: Submit all documents and complete the application.

steps.title: Track decision
steps.description: Monitor the application status and respond to any requests.

steps.title: Confirm passport validity
steps.description: Passport should remain valid for the duration of study.

steps.title: Obtain Letter of Acceptance (DLI)
steps.description: Secure acceptance from a Designated Learning Institution.

steps.title: Complete language proficiency test
steps.description: Most institutions require IELTS, TOEFL, or equivalent.

steps.title: Provincial Attestation Letter (PAL) if applicable
steps.description: Most study permit applications now require a PAL/TAL from the province.

steps.title: Prepare proof of funds (GIC / statements)
steps.description: Show sufficient funds for tuition and living costs, typically via a GIC or bank statements.

steps.title: Complete medical exam (if required)
steps.description: An IRCC-approved panel physician may be required depending on nationality and stay length.

steps.title: Complete document checklist
steps.description: Assemble all required documents for the IRCC online application.

steps.title: Submit study permit application online
steps.description: Apply via the IRCC online portal and pay fees.

steps.title: Provide biometrics
steps.description: Attend a VAC for fingerprints and photo.

steps.title: Track decision
steps.description: Monitor the application and respond to additional requests.

steps.title: Confirm passport validity
steps.description: Passport should be valid and have blank pages.

steps.title: Obtain admission (Zulassungsbescheid)
steps.description: Secure admission or conditional admission from a recognised German HEI.

steps.title: Complete language proficiency test
steps.description: TestDaF/DSH for German programs or IELTS/TOEFL for English programs.

steps.title: Open blocked account (Sperrkonto)
steps.description: Deposit the required amount into a blocked account to satisfy financial proof.

steps.title: Arrange health insurance
steps.description: Obtain travel/health insurance valid in Germany for the initial period.

steps.title: Complete document checklist
steps.description: Assemble all documents for the embassy appointment.

steps.title: Book embassy/consulate appointment
steps.description: Schedule your visa appointment at the German mission.

steps.title: Attend appointment & submit application
steps.description: Attend the visa interview and submit all required documents.

steps.title: Track decision
steps.description: Await processing and respond to any further requests.
